description: Golden repeatability suite for CrucibAI prompt-to-app builds. These prompts cover the first twenty-five app categories we need to win before expanding to 50.

cases.title: SaaS metrics dashboard
cases.goal: Build a SaaS analytics dashboard with login, team overview, KPI cards, saved notes, routing, and deployment readiness.

cases.title: Service marketplace
cases.goal: Build a service marketplace where customers can browse providers, save favorites, view a dashboard, and prepare for checkout integration.

cases.title: Booking workflow
cases.goal: Build a booking app for appointments with a public home page, demo auth, team calendar notes, and deployment proof.

cases.title: CRM pipeline
cases.goal: Build a lightweight CRM pipeline with contacts, deals dashboard, team page, persisted notes, and deploy-ready app files.

cases.title: AI chat workspace
cases.goal: Build an AI chat workspace with login, chat history notes, model status area, routing, and clear mocked provider notes.

cases.title: Ecommerce storefront
cases.goal: Build an ecommerce storefront with product browsing, cart readiness, checkout placeholder, dashboard, and deployment notes.

cases.title: Workflow automation hub
cases.goal: Build a workflow automation hub where a user can describe a workflow, review a run_agent step, track status, and inspect proof.

cases.title: Bring your code repair
cases.goal: Build a bring-your-code repair workspace with import instructions, issue triage dashboard, file review notes, and continue-improving flow.

cases.title: Internal operations tool
cases.goal: Build an internal operations tool with auth, task dashboard, team page, persisted operations notes, and deployment readiness.

cases.title: Conversion landing page
cases.goal: Build a conversion landing page for a product launch with sections, routing-safe preview, saved feedback notes, and export-ready files.

cases.title: Project management board
cases.goal: Build a project management board with tasks, team assignments, saved planning notes, dashboard routing, and deployment readiness.

cases.title: Learning platform
cases.goal: Build a learning platform with course browsing, learner login, progress dashboard, saved study notes, and export-ready proof.

cases.title: Healthcare intake workflow
cases.goal: Build a healthcare intake workflow with patient intake notes, staff dashboard, privacy reminders, mocked auth, and compliance proof notes.

cases.title: Budget tracker
cases.goal: Build a finance budget tracker with expense categories, dashboard summary, saved notes, mocked account auth, and deployment proof.

cases.title: Restaurant ordering
cases.goal: Build a restaurant ordering app with menu browsing, order notes, customer login, team dashboard, and publish readiness.

cases.title: Real estate listings
cases.goal: Build a real estate listing app with property browsing, saved buyer notes, agent team page, dashboard, and export-ready files.

cases.title: Community forum
cases.goal: Build a community forum with member login, topic dashboard, saved moderation notes, team page, and deployment readiness.

cases.title: Event management
cases.goal: Build an event management app with attendee notes, schedule dashboard, organizer team page, routing, and publish readiness.

cases.title: Support ticketing
cases.goal: Build a support ticketing tool with customer issues, agent dashboard, saved triage notes, login, and deployment proof.

cases.title: Inventory management
cases.goal: Build an inventory management tool with stock dashboard, item notes, team routing, mocked auth, and deploy-ready artifacts.

cases.title: Portfolio site
cases.goal: Build a portfolio site with project sections, contact notes, preview-safe routing, export-ready files, and launch copy.

cases.title: Nonprofit donor portal
cases.goal: Build a nonprofit donor portal with campaign dashboard, donor notes, mocked checkout, team page, and deployment readiness.

cases.title: HR onboarding
cases.goal: Build an HR onboarding portal with employee checklist notes, team dashboard, mocked login, policy reminders, and proof artifacts.

cases.title: Analytics report builder
cases.goal: Build an analytics report builder with report dashboard, saved insight notes, team review flow, routing, and export readiness.

cases.title: Mobile companion sketch
cases.goal: Build a mobile companion sketch with responsive pages, login notes, dashboard routing, team preview, and deployment caveats.
